posts.author: BrandiLKT (Brandi LaRue)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

It would be great to be able to auto create or copy subitems from one board to another.

What are you trying to achieve

I would like to be able to automate copying the subitems on one item on one board to an item on another board.

posts.author: Fortimus_Team (Fortimus)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @BrandiLKT ,

Try the Mirror Item Multiple Boards app!

It allows you to add the same item to multiple boards. It also automatically copies existing subitems on the item and auto-creates new ones as well.

I’ll be happy to show you how the app works. Schedule a call with us here or reach out at support@fortimus.co
